title: geranium proximum
intro: Geranium proximum, also known as the "little geranium" or "small geranium", is a perennial plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its delicate pink flowers and robust root system. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of menstrual disorders, anxiety, and stress, due to its high content of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Geranium proximum include its ability to regulate hormonal imbalances, reduce inflammation, and promote a sense of calmness and well-being. Herbal preparations of Geranium proximum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of PMS, menopause, and other gynecological issues.
